---
title: "Resources for workshop about Test-enhanced learning and using AI to support the development of questions"
format:
  html:
    css: ../styles.css
---

[← Back to Teaching](../teaching.qmd){.button}

+------------------+--------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Storage Strength | Retrieval Strength | Example                                                                                                                                         |
+:================:+:==================:+:================================================================================================================================================+
| High             | High               | A doctor stands in front of a patient with a set of symptoms and immediately knows which problem it is.                                         |
+------------------+--------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| High             | Low                | When you try to remember the capital of Australia, which you previously remembered many times, but right now cannot recall.                     |
+------------------+--------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Low              | High               | The meaning of a concept that you have just learned and are now using in a discussion, but which you will have difficulty remembering tomorrow. |
+------------------+--------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Low              | Low                | The name of a new colleague that you heard five minutes ago but now cannot remember.                                                            |
+------------------+--------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

[← Back to Teaching](../teaching.qmd){.button}
